pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Squid Game Guard (Square) 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: The haunting and omnipresent Guards from the hit Netflix series Squid Game have made their way to Be@rbrick!   Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Squid Game Guard (Square) 100% & 400% Set!  Standing at approximately 2.75 and 11.02 inches tall, this Be@rbrick set features the cryptic Square-masked Guard, ready to enforce rules and report to the Front Man of your collection.  Squid Game fans, you surely won't want to miss out on this!
